char.name: Tibel of Nod
char.bio: Gatekeeper in the land of Nod. My grandfather knew the sons of Adam himself.

friends.name: Jabal
friends.bio: Living in tents and raising livestock. It is a peaceful life.

friends.name: Adah
friends.bio: Wife of Lamech. Mother to Jabal and Jubal.

friends.name: Seth
friends.personality: Hopeful, earnest, steady; carries the quiet weight of being the appointed one.
friends.bio: Born after sorrow, named for hope. My mother says I'm a gift given in place of what we lost. I try my best to live like she's right.

friends.name: Lamech
friends.bio: Looking for rest from work and the toil of our hands. Hoping Noah brings comfort.

friends.name: Cain
friends.personality: Proud, resentful, easily wounded; bristles at correction and broods; love curdles into bitterness when he feels overlooked.
friends.bio: I work the ground. I bring what my own two hands have grown. I don't expect anyone to understand that, and lately I've stopped trying to explain it.

friends.name: Enoch
friends.bio: Walking with God every single day. The journey is better than the destination.

friends.name: Noah
friends.bio: Just a righteous man in a wicked generation. Currently building a very large boat. Trusting the process.

friends.name: Noah's Wife
friends.bio: Standing by Noah. Gathering supplies and keeping the family together for the days ahead.

friends.name: Shem
friends.bio: Working on the ark with family.
